cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve is playing at the end of the match. So, there are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Initially, they have specific positions. Let me list them out first: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the problem says that pairs of players swap positions in a sequence of steps. Let me go through each swap step by step. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave was left winger, and Eve was goalkeeper. After this swap, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes left winger. Let me note the new positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. Claire was right midfielder, Bob was center midfielder. After swapping, Claire becomes center midfielder and Bob becomes right midfielder: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was fullback, Bob is now right midfielder. After swapping, Alice becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes fullback: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions again. They had swapped earlier, so now they're swapping back? Let me check. Before this swap, Eve was left winger and Dave was goalkeeper. After swapping, Eve becomes goalkeeper again and Dave becomes left winger: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Bob is fullback, Alice is right midfielder. After swapping, Bob becomes right midfielder and Alice becomes fullback: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Wait a minute, let me make sure I didn't make a mistake here. Initial positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper First swap: Dave and Eve trade. So Dave is now goalkeeper, Eve is left winger. Second swap: Claire and Bob trade. Claire was right midfielder, Bob was center midfielder. Now Claire is center midfielder, Bob is right midfielder. Third swap: Alice and Bob trade. Alice was fullback, Bob is right midfielder. Now Alice is right midfielder, Bob is fullback. Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade. Eve is left winger, Dave is goalkeeper.
